message:
test(ftui-render): add 11 proptest invariants for SpatialHitIndex

Property-based tests covering:
- No panics on any coordinate query (cached + readonly)
- Out-of-bounds queries always return None
- Topmost widget (highest z-order) wins at any point
- hit_test and hit_test_readonly agree
- Register/remove round-trip correctness
- Empty index always returns None
- Deterministic results across identical setups
- Clear empties the index completely
- Widget count tracking accuracy
- Single widget: hit within rect, miss outside

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
